detail.zhHant: Set out Chicken thigh, White rice, Broccoli, Lime, Olive oil, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.
detail.yue: Set out Chicken thigh, White rice, Broccoli, Lime, Olive oil, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.
detail.en: Set out Chicken thigh, White rice, Broccoli, Lime, Olive oil, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.

detail.zhHant: Cook Chicken thigh in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.
detail.yue: Cook Chicken thigh in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.
detail.en: Cook Chicken thigh in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.

detail.zhHant: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Chicken thigh; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.
detail.yue: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Chicken thigh; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.
detail.en: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Chicken thigh; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.

detail.zhHant: Finish Chicken Lettuce Cup Dinner with herbs or lime, taste one bite for balance, and serve right away while warm items are still warm and crisp items stay fresh.
detail.yue: Finish Chicken Lettuce Cup Dinner with herbs or lime, taste one bite for balance, and serve right away while warm items are still warm and crisp items stay fresh.
